title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
